verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned?
verse.verse_2: Indeed, We created man from a sperm-drop mixture that We may try him; and We made him hearing and seeing.
verse.verse_3: Indeed, We guided him to the way, be he grateful or be he ungrateful.
verse.verse_4: Indeed, We have prepared for the disbelievers chains and shackles and a blaze.
verse.verse_5: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kafur,
verse.verse_6: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allah will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].
verse.verse_7: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread.
verse.verse_8: And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive,
verse.verse_9: [Saying], "We feed you only for the countenance of Allah. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.
verse.verse_10: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful."
verse.verse_11: So Allah will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness
verse.verse_12: And will reward them for what they patiently endured [with] a garden [in Paradise] and silk [garments].
verse.verse_13: [They will be] reclining therein on adorned couches. They will not see therein any [burning] sun or [freezing] cold.
verse.verse_14: And near above them are its shades, and its [fruit] to be picked will be lowered in compliance.
verse.verse_15: And there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been [created] clear [as glass],
verse.verse_16: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure.
verse.verse_17: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger
verse.verse_18: [From] a fountain within Paradise named Salsabeel.
verse.verse_19: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.
verse.verse_20: And when you look there [in Paradise], you will see pleasure and great dominion.
verse.verse_21: Upon the inhabitants will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.
verse.verse_22: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated."
verse.verse_23: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muhammad], the Qur'an progressively.
verse.verse_24: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever].
verse.verse_25: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening
verse.verse_26: And during the night prostrate to Him and exalt Him a long [part of the] night.
verse.verse_27: Indeed, these [disbelievers] love the immediate and leave behind them a grave Day.
verse.verse_28: We have created them and strengthened their forms, and when We will, We can change their likenesses with [complete] alteration.
verse.verse_29: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way.
verse.verse_30: And you do not will except that Allah wills. Indeed, Allah is ever Knowing and Wise.
verse.verse_31: He admits whom He wills into His mercy; but the wrongdoers - He has prepared for them a painful punishment.
